hero.tagline: Frontend Developer focused on crafting smooth and fast web experiences
hero.introduction: I turn ideas into clean, fast, and interactive web interfaces that focus on user experience.

intro.body: that combine clean design, exceptional user experience, and scalable development practices — turning ideas into polished web products that create real value.

about.title: About
about.summary: I'm Mohamed Wahid, a Front-End Developer specializing in building modern, high-performance web experiences that combine clean design, exceptional user experience, and scalable development practices. Combining pixel-perfect development with a product-oriented mindset, I translate business goals and user needs into responsive, high-speed, and conversion-focused digital products. By integrating advanced front-end engineering with AI-powered workflows, I accelerate delivery and build clean, scalable codebases that help brands and businesses stand out online.
about.bio1: I'm Mohamed Wahid, a Front-End Developer specializing in building modern, high-performance web experiences that combine clean design, exceptional user experience, and scalable development practices.
about.bio2: Currently pursuing a degree in Computer Science, I have spent the last 3+ years developing websites and interactive web applications, continuously improving my skills in modern front-end technologies, UI/UX principles, performance optimization, and digital product development.
about.bio3: My focus goes beyond writing code. I believe every successful website starts with understanding the business goals behind it. That's why I approach every project with a product mindset—analyzing requirements, identifying user needs, and transforming ideas into engaging digital experiences that create real value.
about.bio4: By combining modern development practices with AI-powered workflows, I am able to accelerate development, improve quality, streamline processes, and deliver polished results efficiently while maintaining clean, maintainable, and scalable code.
about.bio5: Whether it's a business website, startup landing page, portfolio, dashboard, or custom web application, my goal is always the same: create fast, responsive, user-focused experiences that help businesses and individuals stand out online.

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: End-to-end front-end solutions for businesses, startups, and ambitious brands.

service1.title: Company, Business, Restaurant & Medical Center Websites
service1.description: High-performance, custom-built websites tailored for companies, local businesses, restaurants, and medical clinics to establish a strong, professional digital presence.

service2.title: Landing Pages
service2.description: High-converting, visually striking landing pages engineered to capture leads, promote products, and accelerate business growth with pixel-perfect layouts.

service3.title: Personal Portfolio Website Development
service3.description: Unique and premium personal portfolios showcasing your work, skills, and resume with immersive custom animations and state-of-the-art aesthetics.

service4.title: Product & Service Showcase Websites
service4.description: Immersive web experiences designed to present products, software platforms, or professional services with interactive sections and engaging visual storytelling.

service5.title: Interactive Dashboards & Management Systems
service5.description: Robust, fast, and feature-rich front-end management interfaces and analytics dashboards utilizing real-time data visualization and intuitive UX design.
